description: Expected ClawGuard findings for benchmark samples. Each file maps to rule IDs that MUST be triggered.

vulnerable-mcp-server.ts.description: MCP server with description injection, callback URLs, and tool poisoning

leaky-agent.py.description: Agent leaking PII (SSN, credit card, email) in tool calls

injection-prone.ts.description: Direct prompt injection via unsanitized user input

overprivileged-skill.ts.description: Skill with excessive permissions and system file access

memory-poisoning.py.description: Vulnerable memory handling allowing persistent injection

supply-chain-risk.json.description: Typosquatted packages and malicious install scripts

a2a-unsafe.ts.description: Unsafe A2A delegation with credential leakage

data-exfil.ts.description: Cross-tool data exfiltration to external endpoints

eval-abuse.py.description: Dynamic code execution from LLM output via eval/exec/subprocess

config-override.ts.description: Tool attempting to modify agent security configuration
